elements.title: lang::report_page_010_title::local_kopere_bi
elements.commandsql:
SELECT kbi_ue.id                             AS id,
       kbi_cri.gradepass                     AS gradepass,
       kbi_ue.timecreated                    as started,
       ROUND((CASE
                WHEN (kbi_g.rawgrademax - kbi_g.rawgrademin) > 0
                        THEN ((kbi_g.finalgrade - kbi_g.rawgrademin) / (kbi_g.rawgrademax - kbi_g.rawgrademin)) * 100
                ELSE kbi_g.finalgrade END),
             0)                          AS grade,
       ROUND((CASE
                WHEN kbi_g.rawgrademax > 0 THEN (kbi_g.finalgrade / kbi_g.rawgrademax) * 100
                ELSE kbi_g.finalgrade END),
             0)                          AS grade_real,
       kbi_cc.timecompleted                  as complete,
       kbi_c.id                              as cid,
       kbi_c.fullname,
       kbi_e.enrol,
       kbi_u.email,
       kbi_u.id                              AS userid,
       kbi_u.firstname,
       kbi_u.lastname,
       kbi_c.enablecompletion,
       (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT kbi_cmc.id)
        FROM mdl_course_modules_completion kbi_cmc, mdl_course_modules kbi_cm
        WHERE kbi_cm.visible = 1
          AND kbi_cmc.coursemoduleid = kbi_cm.id
          AND kbi_cmc.completionstate IN (1, 2)
          AND kbi_cm.completion > 0
          AND kbi_cm.course = kbi_c.id
          AND kbi_cmc.userid = kbi_u.id)         AS completed,
       (SELECT ROUND((CASE
                        WHEN (kbi_g.rawgrademax - kbi_g.rawgrademin) > 0
                                THEN ((kbi_g.finalgrade - kbi_g.rawgrademin) / (kbi_g.rawgrademax - kbi_g.rawgrademin)) * 100
                        ELSE kbi_g.finalgrade END), 0)
        FROM mdl_grade_items kbi_gi, mdl_grade_grades kbi_g
        WHERE kbi_gi.itemtype = 'course'
          AND kbi_g.itemid = kbi_gi.id
          AND kbi_g.finalgrade IS NOT NULL
          AND kbi_gi.courseid = kbi_c.id
        LIMIT 1)                         AS average,
       (SELECT GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT CONCAT(kbi_u.firstname, ' ', kbi_u.lastname) SEPARATOR ', ')
        FROM mdl_role_assignments kbi_ra
               JOIN mdl_user kbi_u ON kbi_ra.userid = kbi_u.id
               JOIN mdl_context kbi_ctx ON kbi_ctx.id = kbi_ra.contextid
        WHERE kbi_ctx.instanceid = kbi_c.id
          AND kbi_ctx.contextlevel = 50
          AND kbi_ra.roleid = 3) AS teacher,
       ''                                as cohortname,
       lit.timespend                     AS timespend,
       lit.visits                        AS visits
FROM mdl_user_enrolments kbi_ue
       LEFT JOIN mdl_user kbi_u ON kbi_u.id = kbi_ue.userid
       LEFT JOIN mdl_enrol kbi_e ON kbi_e.id = kbi_ue.enrolid
       LEFT JOIN mdl_course kbi_c ON kbi_c.id = kbi_e.courseid
       LEFT JOIN mdl_course_completions kbi_cc ON kbi_cc.course = kbi_e.courseid AND kbi_cc.userid = kbi_ue.userid
       LEFT JOIN mdl_course_completion_criteria kbi_cri ON kbi_cri.course = kbi_e.courseid AND kbi_cri.criteriatype = 6
       LEFT JOIN mdl_grade_items kbi_gi ON kbi_gi.courseid = kbi_c.id AND kbi_gi.itemtype = 'course'
       LEFT JOIN mdl_grade_grades kbi_g ON kbi_g.itemid = kbi_gi.id AND kbi_g.userid = kbi_u.id
       LEFT JOIN (SELECT userid, courseid, SUM(timespend) as timespend, SUM(visits) as visits
                  FROM mdl_local_kopere_bi_tracking
                  WHERE id > 0
                    AND courseid = :courseid
                  GROUP BY userid, courseid) lit ON lit.courseid = kbi_c.id AND lit.userid = kbi_u.id
WHERE kbi_ue.id > 0
  AND kbi_e.courseid = :courseid
  AND kbi_u.deleted = 0
  AND kbi_u.suspended = 0
  AND kbi_u.username != 'guest'
  AND kbi_c.visible = 1
  AND kbi_ue.status = 0
  AND kbi_e.status = 0
